item.title: Version 0.19.0 (build 28)
item.description:
Added

  • Certificate setup now includes a clearer Mac guide, export flow, and custom certificate management path for smoother trusted capture setup.
  • Node.js Developer Setup now includes selected-client validation and a fuller localhost sample guide for axios, Node core, and got.

Changed

  • Clarified Flutter and Dart Developer Setup Hub validation as a manual hybrid flow with clearer certificate guidance.

Fixed

  • Helper and certificate recovery paths now give clearer remediation when trust setup needs attention.
  • Inspector body and response previews now behave more consistently during transaction review.
